description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural grain texture and a matte finish. The handle is topped with a dark, wedge-shaped metal blade that has a single sharp edge and a flat poll on the opposite side. The blade is securely mounted onto the handle, with the mounting appearing traditional, likely wedged into the wooden shaft. The axe head is made of metal, showing a rough, utilitarian surface with no visible decorative elements. The overall design is practical and functional, suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks in an urban or suburban environment. No visible markings, engravings, or brand labels are present on either the handle or the blade.
description: A practical hand axe with a wooden handle and a dark, wedge-shaped metal blade, designed for chopping tasks. The handle is slightly curved and the blade is securely mounted with a traditional wedged fit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the profile of the wedge-shaped metal blade.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the circular cross-section of the handle and the narrow edge of the blade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the blade and handle, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the end of the handle and the back of the axe head, showing the poll and mounting.
attribute_handle_type: Slightly curved wooden handle with a round cross-section, natural grain, and no added grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll and no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the wooden handle.
